_comment: Copy this to config.json and fill it in (install.bat does this for you). config.json is gitignored so the app password never reaches GitHub.
_source_mailboxes_note: The Gmail labels to back up. List as many as you want - the tool reads each one and de-duplicates. These must match the label names EXACTLY as Gmail shows them over IMAP. To see the exact names, run: python -c "import imaplib,json; c=json.load(open('config.json')); m=imaplib.IMAP4_SSL('imap.gmail.com',993); m.login(c['gmail_address'],c['gmail_app_password']); [print(x) for x in m.list()[1]]; m.logout()"
